framework.name: SPIFFE Per-Instance Agent Identity
framework.description: Solo.io argues SPIFFE IDs today are anchored to Kubernetes service accounts, making all replicas identical. Agents need per-instance SPIFFE IDs (e.g., /instance/001) because non-deterministic behavior means no two agent replicas can be treated as the same identity for compliance/audit purposes.
framework.raw_quote: no two replicas of an 'agent' are guaranteed to behave the same and from a compliance, security, and auditing standpoint they cannot be considered the same identities

source.title: Agent Identity and Access Management - Can SPIFFE Work? | Solo.io
